nasb.text: At the blast of Your nostrils the waters were piled up, The flowing waters stood up like a heap; The deeps were congealed in the heart of the sea.

esv.text: At the blast of your nostrils the waters piled up; the floods stood up in a heap; the deeps congealed in the heart of the sea.

cnv.text: 你鼻孔中的氣一發，海水就堆聚起來；水流直立像堤壩，深淵凝結於海心。

ccb.text: 你的鼻孔一呼气，海水便堆聚起来， 洪涛便堆起水墙，海底深处也都凝固。
